entry_points.what: Typer CLI registered as the 'promptverge' console script (pyproject.toml [project.scripts]); exposes 'engineering' and 'knowledge' subcommands
python -m promptverge entry point; delegates to promptverge.main:app()
node forensic_pipeline.mjs CLI; five-stage forensic audit orchestrator with --stage/--from/--fresh/--selftest/--preflight flags
